provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Data Science and Technology Major Requirements
note: This supplement is cohort-specific to students admitted in 2025-26 and binds only the plain BSc in Data Science and Technology Major. The official curriculum is joint-disciplinary across MATH, COMP and ELEC. Students taking DSCT as their first major are explicitly exempted from School Requirements but must still complete University requirements. The supplement records all six pre-enrollment prerequisite codes, all 24 unique Major Required and alternative codes, and the complete bounded 37-course Data Science Elective list. Elective rules depend on the capstone path: students choosing MATH 4995 need at least 4 electives / 12 credits with at least 2 COMP/ELEC courses; students choosing COMP 4981 or COMP 4981H need at least 3 electives / 9 credits with at least 1 COMP/ELEC course; either way at least 1 and no more than 2 electives may be MATH. COMP 4910 is an official 6-credit capstone alternative, but the PDF does not state which 9- or 12-credit elective rule applies to that path, so this remains manual review required. No open numbered pool is expanded. Recommended Year and semester values come only from the official 2025-26 normative pathway; alternative courses not selected by the example receive no inferred placement. The pathway shows DSCT 4900 in every term from Year 2 Fall through Year 4 Spring, which is retained as a description rather than compressed into a misleading single-term assignment. The admission code also references JS5282 Engineering with Extended Major in Artificial Intelligence, but no Extended Major requirements are copied into this Major.
